regional_cost_note: Carpet layers in Whangarei typically charge $60–$85/hr. Supply-and-lay carpet is usually quoted per m²: expect $35–$60/m² for mid-range carpet installed.

businesses.name: Northland Carpets Ltd
businesses.known_for: Local Northland carpet and flooring specialists based in Whangarei serving residential and commercial clients.

businesses.name: Advanced Flooring Solutions LTD
businesses.known_for: Carpet laying, vinyl installation, and flooring repairs across Auckland and Whangarei.
